title: Blackboard Experience Index
description: Schema for the experience index file that tracks all stored experience entries

entries.description: Index records pointing to individual experience files

id.description: Unique identifier for this experience entry

file.description: Relative path to the experience JSON file (e.g. YYYY-MM-DD_task-slug.json)

task_type.description: Category of task this experience was recorded from

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the experience was recorded

confidence.description: Confidence score for this experience (0.0 = low, 1.0 = high)

metadata.description: Administrative metadata about the experience index

total_count.description: Total number of experience entries in the index

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent write to this index

max_entries.description: Maximum number of entries to retain before pruning is triggered

pruning_strategy.description: Strategy used to remove entries when max_entries is exceeded (e.g. remove_oldest_low_confidence)
